channel.title: Reuben Ingber — Field Notes
channel.description: Links, images, and things worth sharing.

item.title: My Former Colleagues Are Destroying the Democratic Party
item.description: My Former Colleagues Are Destroying the Democratic Party

item.title: TP-Link Deco X60 (Costco)
item.description: Just upgraded my home wifi network and everything seems to be working as expected. Hot tip courtesy of Chat-GPT, use the same network name (SSID) and password and all your devices (including smart plugs) will most likely reconnect to the new network seamlessly.

item.title: Tech debt in a zero-interest-rate environment
item.description: Tech debt in a zero-interest-rate environment

item.title: Why Some Dad Don't have friends
item.description: Why Some Dad Don't have friends

item.title: 5 Things World-Class Engineers Do
item.description: Two things stuck: monthly (not annual) progress check-ins, and amplifying the people around you as the actual multiplier. Also — "packaged engineering." That term is going to live in my head, especially for editorial tools.
